claim: Explorer, cross-checker, and verifier cite project paths and boundary audit keeps PRD readiness blocked on missing evidence or target-project mutation.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() captures full project filesystem state as SHA-256 digests before agent execution, excluding allowed write roots.
evidence.why: Boundary audit requires pre-execution baseline to detect any target-project mutation.

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots() compares pre/post digests to detect added, modified, or deleted files.
evidence.why: Change detection identifies violations that must block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Runtime captures boundary snapshots before/after each agent, then builds diff blocking result.
evidence.why: Execution loop ensures boundary audit happens for every dispatched agent.

evidence.summary: Boundary mutations become BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers; external research requests without external evidence become EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blockers.
evidence.why: Blockers prevent PRD readiness when boundary audit detects violations or missing evidence.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() classifies evidence records as project/external/user/unknown based on path, url, and source fields.
evidence.why: Scope validation ensures agents declare evidence sources correctly.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() and evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator() validate that project-scope evidence includes repo-relative paths.
evidence.why: Project facts require concrete path locators; URL-only evidence is treated as external.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE or PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers when evidence lacks project scope or path.
evidence.why: Blockers prevent PRD readiness when agents fail to cite project paths for project facts.

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing() filters out non-missing status text but keeps actionable items; isNonMissingStatusItem() prevents status notes from masking gaps.
evidence.why: Missing field validation keeps PRD blocked on unresolved evidence gaps.

evidence.summary: execution_policy boundary block forbids project_mutation and allows writes only to output_dir; agent_instruction is boundary_controlled.
evidence.why: Execution policy enforces non-editing boundary for evidence agents by default.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt hard rule: boundary forbids modifying target project files; allowed artifact root is output_dir.
evidence.why: Hard rules explicitly instruct agents to avoid project mutations.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers when required evidence agents have not completed.
evidence.why: Blockers prevent PRD readiness until explorer/cross-checker/verifier complete.

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() requires executeAgents and allowAgentDispatch flags before running agents; otherwise returns dry_run or blocked status.
evidence.why: Explicit authorization prevents accidental execution during evidence gathering.

evidence.summary: Runtime blockers are merged into readiness.blockers[] and set prd_ready=false, resulting in blocked status and DEMAND_EVIDENCE_DISPATCH_BLOCKED code.
evidence.why: Blockers from boundary audit and missing evidence directly prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation() constructs Claude CLI args with -p, --permission-mode=bypassPermissions, --no-session-persistence for agent dispatch.
evidence.why: Provider invocation configures full Claude agent execution with bypassed permissions for evidence tasks.

evidence.summary: Evidence scope declaration issues generate EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blockers when records lack valid scope field.
evidence.why: Blockers prevent agents from presenting evidence without declaring its source scope.

risks: Boundary snapshot may miss filesystem changes if git ls-files is incomplete or excluded directories have moved files.
Evidence agents might still mutate project files via external tooling if provider tool permissions are misconfigured.
sanitizeMissing() regex patterns might misclassify complex status text as missing when it is actually informational.

result.notes: Evidence dispatch and router implementation comprehensively support boundary audit, evidence scope validation, and blocker generation for missing evidence and project mutations. All three agent roles (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) require path citations for project facts, and boundary violations directly block PRD readiness via BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION and PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE error codes.
